title: brain source add — --json success output
description: Deterministic Tier-1 source capture that APPLIES immediately (D11) — no preview mode. Funnels through captureSource: scan-before-persist (secret detection ⇒ exit 3, quarantined, nothing persisted), dedup by (rawContentHash, canonicalMediaType), capture keyed (contentId, origin), broker Tier-1 CAS integration. Reports the minted ids + what was reused.

blob.description: True when an existing content blob was reused (identical bytes).

capture.description: True when an existing capture (contentId, origin) was reused (idempotent re-add).

x-atlas-contract.summary: Deterministic Tier-1 source capture; applies immediately.

args.name: <path>
args.description: Path to the source file to capture.

sideEffects: copies raw bytes immutably under sources/
writes the content-blob/capture/rendition manifests + a source note
integrates the capture commit via broker Tier-1 CAS (advances canonical exactly one commit)
writes ledger rows + one terminal run.integrated audit-ref event via finalizeLedgerWrite
prohibitedEffects: no byte persists or transmits before the secret scan passes (scan-before-persist)
never mutates a note other than the created source note

errorCodes.when: the source cannot be normalized (typed normalization rejection)
ledger-writing is blocked pending a verified backup
